cdk.up: eval "$(AWS_PROFILE={{AWS_PROFILE}} aws configure export-credentials --format env)" && export AWS_REGION="$(AWS_PROFILE={{AWS_PROFILE}} aws configure get region)" AWS_DEFAULT_REGION="$AWS_REGION" && npm ci && npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/cdk deploy --all -c stage={{STAGE}} --require-approval never
cdk.down: eval "$(AWS_PROFILE={{AWS_PROFILE}} aws configure export-credentials --format env)" && export AWS_REGION="$(AWS_PROFILE={{AWS_PROFILE}} aws configure get region)" AWS_DEFAULT_REGION="$AWS_REGION" && npm ci && npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/cdk destroy --all -c stage={{STAGE}} --force
